references.role: Structural Licorn kitchen volumetric continuity for every Seedance segment
references.prompt: Preserve cabinet geometry, luminous terrazzo massing, lighting temperature, island placement. Structural context anchor only—not a mandate to compose every shot as architectural wide-angle.

references.role: Terrazzo countertop overhead storytelling + hinge-cut / fold geometry legibility
references.prompt: Lock cutting-board island plane, shadow softness, countertop color calibration for tortilla quadrant reads.

references.role: Primary island-front identity for heroes, bites, finale satisfaction framing
references.prompt: Use when mediums or plating closers demand recognizable Licorn frontal island richness including terrazzo veining fidelity.

references.role: Flush black induction choreography with skillet taco + crunchwrap blister coverage
references.prompt: Maintain consistent burner-scale proportion, subdued reflections, forbid invented gas grates.

references.role: Macro thermal fidelity for spice blooming, leopard blister skin science, cheesy seam ooze macros
references.prompt: Tight shimmering heat haze fidelity without open flame hallucinations.

references.role: Canonical Licorn mascot body + wardrobe fidelity across hands/torso shots
references.prompt: Do not freestyle alternate costumes; uphold approved horn + apron grammar.

references.role: Top-down kinematic posture for tortillas, folds, strata bisect choreography
references.prompt: Use with overhead kitchen plates to constrain wrist orientation and plausible knife arcs.

references.role: Frontal bite tableau posture legibility referencing satisfying munch macro
references.prompt: Guarantee readable jaw alignment + snack scale without caricature deformation.

references.role: Three-quarter relaxed victory posture anchoring finale satisfaction beat
references.prompt: Soft confident shoulders, approachable hero energy, harmonious with platter foreground steam.

references.role: Approved subtle smile / satisfaction micro-expression bandwidth for finale
references.prompt: Keeps mascot from drifting into exaggerated meme faces.

references.role: Flexible crumble breakdown + spice folding for taco meat
references.prompt: Prefer over rigid tools for scrambling ground beef lumps in skillet choreography.

references.role: Rigid lift + controlled flip choreography for toasted triangular wedge
references.prompt: Supports entire puck area to avoid taco tear-outs; distinguishes from flexible bowl spatulas.

references.role: Rounded silhouette for taco reserve transfer gestures + garnish dollops cues
references.prompt: Helps articulate humble scoop physics without inventing ornate ladles.

references.role: Flattened flour tortilla exhibiting exactly one radial slit from hub to rim before toppings
references.prompt: Generate overhead photo of authentic ~10 inch flour tortilla on neutral board featuring exactly ONE hinge cut bisecting from dead center outward toward ONE rim cardinal point ONLY. No taco fold yet, no fillings, tortilla pliable softly creased negatives: forbid multiple slashes, forbid star-shaped wedges.

references.role: Pre-fold quadrant map for Crunchwrap supreme edition fillings
references.prompt: Overhead authoritative photo of radial-hinged tortilla with FOUR cleanly separated wedges: leafy lettuce/tomato sector, sour cream with half-dozen tortilla chips crisp-up, spiced ground beef crowned with shredded Mexican blend quadrant, solitary cheese-bed quadrant negatives: forbid blurry homogenous taco salad swirl.

references.role: Post-skillet leopard-spotted tortilla skin before cross-section storytelling
references.prompt: Macro/tight hero of triangular folded crunchwrap emphasizing amber micro-blister topography, subdued cheese ooze halo at seams, negatives: forbids uniform charcoal black cremation, forbids dripping orange grease flood.

references.role: Vertical split exposing chip laminate, lettuce strata, spiced beef crumble, fused cheeses
references.prompt: Generate controlled cross-section of stacked TikTok quadrant crunchwrap emphasizing crisp planar tortilla chip sheet embedded between dairy and vegetables with recognizable taco beef crumble band negatives: forbids monochrome brown paste illusion, forbids exaggerated infinite cheese tether CGI.
